name: Amaral Bus Co Inc
districts_or_customers: Multiple Southcoast MA and Rhode Island school districts; charter/field trips/weddings across New England
recent_news: Actively hiring school bus and 7D/PTV van drivers with attractive incentives (2025-2026); operates CDL training school at 29 Ruth St, New Bedford, MA
fit_notes: Classic family-owned MA/RI school bus + charter operator with adjacent CDL training and vehicle sales lines; in-region tuck-in for Summit's Northeast footprint with multi-district contracts and 7D special-needs van capability

name: Dufour Escorted Tours Inc
principals: William D. Dufour and Barbara Dufour (co-owners); originally co-founded with uncle John Dufour as Dufour Brothers Inc.
districts_or_customers: Western Massachusetts and Southern Vermont school districts including Central Berkshire Regional, Lenoxdale, Lee, Lenox, North Adams, Williamstown, Bennington VT
recent_news: Co-owners William and Barbara Dufour previously announced plans to retire and discontinued the motor coach/tour business after 37 years (~2011) to focus on the school bus fleet; remains family-owned operator of ~197 school vehicles
fit_notes: Highly attractive Summit tuck-in: 60+ year multi-generational family operator with ~197 school buses across Western MA / Southern VT, prior retirement signal from owners, regional density in Summit's Northeast footprint. NOTE: The 'Franklin Park IL' HQ field in source data appears to be an error; HQ is Hinsdale MA.

name: Bowens Bus Svc
districts_or_customers: Howard County Public Schools (HCPSS) - 56 routes; multiple local private schools; charter services
recent_news: Grew from 1 bus in 2001 to 56 routes and 80+ buses; appears on HCPSS school transportation contractor lists (SY22-23 and current); HQ in Glenelg MD (not Baltimore as input data indicates)
fit_notes: Strong founder-led MD operator with deep HCPSS contractor relationship and 56 routes - attractive density in a Summit expansion-adjacent state. Founder Michael Bowen is original owner (24+ yrs) - reasonable succession candidate; private school work adds margin upside.

name: Eden Valley School Bus Lines
districts_or_customers: Eden Valley-Watkins ISD #463 (Meeker County MN, ~960 K-12 students)
recent_news: Per 4.0 School Services site, 'Eden Valley Bus Service' has been providing transportation since 2021 under their operation; FMCSA DOT# 1556242 lists Eden Valley School Bus Line Inc since 2006 with 12 tractors/18 drivers, intrastate within 100 miles
fit_notes: Very small single-district MN operator (~12 buses, 1 district); appears to be operated/managed by 4.0 School Services (St. Peter MN, 35+ yrs, 27+ districts) - not the website 'evw.k12.mn.us' which is the school district itself. Sub-scale for direct tuck-in; only relevant if Summit pursues 4.0 School Services as the larger MN platform.

name: All Aboard School Trnsprtn LLC
owner_or_parent: Kelsian Group (ASX:KLS, Australia) via AAAHI Topco Corporation / All Aboard America Holdings
principals: William 'Bill' Trimarco (former CEO, now Advisor, AAAHI - Golden/Lakewood CO); AAAHI executive team
districts_or_customers: Historically Texas school districts (All Aboard Schools brand - 14 TX districts over 30+ yrs); per FMCSA filing the LLC 'no longer provides passenger motor carrier services'
recent_news: June 2023: Kelsian Group completed acquisition of AAAHI (parent of All Aboard America School Transportation LLC) for ~$325M; per Federal Register filing 4/14/2023, All Aboard America School Transportation, LLC 'no longer provides passenger motor carrier services'. Sister brand All Aboard Schools still operates in TX under AAAHI/Kelsian.
fit_notes: NOT a tuck-in target. Owned by Kelsian Group (Australian strategic) via AAAHI since 2023; the LLC itself is per FMCSA filing inactive as a passenger carrier. Affiliated All Aboard Schools brand continues in TX but is part of a $487M+ strategic-owned platform - exclude from independent target list.
